conversation.content: Let's have a physics class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the momentum theorem in mechanics calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional physics formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the momentum theorem is: its form is F = m × Δv / t².
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for force F when mass m, velocity change Δv, and time t are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
